ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trade_policy" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade policy record */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country issuing the trade policy */,
  "uncertainty_value" REAL /* Value representing trade policy uncertainty */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trade policy data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the trade policy */,
  "impact_level" TEXT /* Level of impact the trade policy is expected to have on the market */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trade policy data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "infectious_disease" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease record */,
  "emv_index" REAL /* EMV index value for infectious disease */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the disease data */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the disease is reported */,
  "region" TEXT /* Specific region within the country */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the disease data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock index */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stock index */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the index is denominated */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the index */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the index data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index data record */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock index */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Close price of the index */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the index */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the index data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Open price of the index */,
  "high_price" REAL /* High price of the index on that day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Low price of the index on that day */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in closing price from the previous day */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the index data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_data_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES indices ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date of the last password change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the access request */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Response time of the access request in milliseconds */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Specific data or report accessed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the report */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Keywords or tags associated with the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the report was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the role was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the user was assigned to the role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the user was removed from the role (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user role assignment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emv_tracker" (
  "tracker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each EMV tracker record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the EMV data */,
  "emv_value" REAL /* EMV value for market volatility */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the EMV data */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used to calculate the EMV value */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the EMV value */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or remarks about the EMV value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tracker_id")
)
